zh.lifeSummary: 當Rey Juan I de Aragón於1350年12月27日出生在法國藍多-盧希隆培列內-利塔利斯培爾皮南時，他的父親Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón31歲，母親Infanta Leonora de Sicilia25歲。他於1373年6月24日與Marta d'Armagnac在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1396年5月19日在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納托洛拉亞 德 蒙格利享年45歲，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞塔拉戈納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rey Juan I de Aragón于1350年12月27日出生在法国藍多-盧希隆培列內-利塔利斯培爾皮南时，他的父亲Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón31岁，母亲Infanta Leonora de Sicilia25岁。他于1373年6月24日与Marta d'Armagnac在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1396年5月19日在西班牙卡塔倫亞赫羅納托洛拉亞 德 蒙格利享年45岁，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞塔拉戈納。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aragón
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Juan, Ruben, Fernando, Jesus, Julio, Luis, Raul, Mario, Alfonso.

Spanish (Aragón) and southern French: habitational name from Aragon, Spain, which was an independent kingdom from 1035 to 1479. It took its name from the river Aragón, which arises in its northwestern corner. The river name may be related to Basque (h)ara(n) ‘valley’; in Basque, Aragon is called Aragoa or Aragoi, which probably means ‘high valley’. Compare Deragon .

variants.name: Deragon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Monique, Pierre, Raoul, Rejean.

French: variant of Daragon, habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, denoting someone from Aragon, a region and medieval kingdom in Spain (see Aragon ), or a habitational name for someone from Aragon, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Deragon is very rare in France. Compare Dragon .

variants.name: Aragones
meanings: Spanish (Aragonés): habitational or ethnic name for someone from Aragon (see Aragon ).

variants.name: Aragona
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Ciro, Domenic, Domenico, Gaspare.  Spanish Carolina, Ninfa, Rosario.

Italian (mainly southern): habitational or ethnic name for someone from the former kingdom of Aragon (see   Aragon  ); the surname arrived in Italy in the wake of the Aragonese conquest and domination of southern Italy, which began in 1282.

nameMeanings.name: Juan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , now also used as a given name in English-speaking countries, in spite of the unfavourable associations with Don Juan, the heartless seducer of  Mozart's  opera Don Giovanni (  1788 ) and libertine hero of  Byron's  satirical epic (  1819–24 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Rey Juan I de Aragón was born on 27 December 1350, in Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, his father, Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón, was 31 and his mother, Infanta Leonora de Sicilia, was 25. He married Marta d'Armagnac on 24 June 1373, in Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 19 May 1396, in Torroella de Montgrí, Girona, Catalonia, Spain, at the age of 45, and was buried in Tarragona, Catalonia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rey Juan I de Aragón est né le 27 décembre 1350, à Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, son père, Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Infanta Leonora de Sicilia, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Marta d'Armagnac le 24 juin 1373, à Barcelona, Catalunya, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1396, à Torroella de Montgrí, Girona, Catalunya, Espagne, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Tarragona, Catalunya, Espagne.

de.Torroella de Montgrí, Girona, Catalonia,: Torroella de Montgrí, Girona, Catalunya, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Rey Juan I de Aragón am 27. Dezember 1350 in Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón 31 und seine Mutter Infanta Leonora de Sicilia 25. Er hat am 24. Juni 1373 in Barcelona, Catalunya, Spanien Marta d'Armagnac geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. Mai 1396 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Torroella de Montgrí, Girona, Catalunya, Spanien und wurde in Tarragona, Catalunya, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rey Juan I de Aragón è nato il il 27 dicembre 1350 nel Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, il suo padre, Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Infanta Leonora de Sicilia, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Marta d'Armagnac il 24 giugno 1373, nel Barcelona, Catalunya, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 maggio 1396, nel Torroella de Montgrí, Girona, Catalunya, Spagna, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Tarragona, Catalunya, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Rey Juan I de Aragónが1350年12月27日にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンプイルeンeエス-オリーンタレスペルパグナンで生まれた時，父Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragónは31歳，母Infanta Leonora de Siciliaは25歳であった。1373年6月24日にスペインカタルニーアバーセロナでMarta d'Armagnacと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1396年5月19日にスペインカタルニーアギロナトローラ ド モントグルiで45歳で死去し，スペインカタルニーアターラゴナにて埋葬された。

ko.Torroella de Montgrí, Girona, Catalonia,: 스페인 카털니아 지로나 토로라 데 몽그i
ko.lifeSummary: Rey Juan I de Aragón(이)가 1350년 12월 27일 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 p이ee스-리탤스 p르피그난에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Infanta Leonora de Sicilia(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1373년 6월 24일 스페인 카털니아 바셀나에서 Marta d'Armagnac(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 5월 19일 스페인 카털니아 지로나 토로라 데 몽그i에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카털니아 터아라곤아에 묻혔다.

pt.Torroella de Montgrí, Girona, Catalonia,: Torroella de Montgrí, Girona, Catalunya, Espanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rey Juan I de Aragón nasceu em 27 de dezembro de 1350, em Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, seu pai, Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Infanta Leonora de Sicilia, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Marta d'Armagnac em 24 de junho de 1373, em Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 19 de maio de 1396, em Torroella de Montgrí, Girona, Catalunya, Espanha, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Tarragona, Catalunya, Espanha.

ru.Torroella de Montgrí, Girona, Catalonia,: торроелла де монтгрi, гирона, каталуня, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rey Juan I de Aragón родился 27 декабря 1350 г. в местности пирпигнан, пирeнeес-ориентеилесь, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция, его отцу по имени Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Infanta Leonora de Sicilia, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Marta d'Armagnac 24 июня 1373 г. в местности барселона, каталуня, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 19 мая 1396 г. в местности торроелла де монтгрi, гирона, каталуня, Испания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности таррагона, каталуня, Испания.

es.27 December 1350–19 May 1396: 27 de diciembre de 1350–19 de mayo de 1396
es.Torroella de Montgrí, Girona, Catalonia,: Torroella de Montgrí, Gerona, Cataluña, España
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rey Juan I de Aragón nació el 27 de diciembre de 1350, en Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, su papá, Pedro IV Ceremoniosus Rey de Aragón, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Infanta Leonora de Sicilia, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Marta d'Armagnac el 24 de junio de 1373, en Barcelona, Cataluña, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1396, en Torroella de Montgrí, Gerona, Cataluña, España, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Tarragona, Cataluña, España.
